calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Pltf'S Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Balvir Chand, defendant and moving party, in Propria Persona
Robert E. Cohen, for plaintiff and opposing party: Creditors Trade association, Inc.

After hearing, Defendant Balvir Chand's Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Plaintiff's Motion Appointment Of Receiver is taken under submission. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Pltf'S Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Continued To Oct-16-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Balvir Chand, judgment debtor and moving party in Propria Persona
Robert Resner, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Creditors Trade association, Inc.

Hearing held, Defendant Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s motion for reconsideration of order granting plaintiff's motion appointment of receiver.
Order for Receivership stayed to 10/16/09; hearing continued to 10/16/09 at 10:30 a.m. in Dept. 610.
Plaintiff to provide defendant with correct balance due on judgment, so that parties can attempt to arrange for payment. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Mo For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion for appointment of receiver, and to appoint Richard B. Cole as receiver is granted. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
